partial_progress.details: Added caseB_M_not_reflexive lemma proving M is NOT reflexive in Case B. Moved irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future to earlier in file. Restructured Case B1 V=M' branch to use seriality-based approach: gets strict future W from M, then analyzes W's relation to M'. One sub-case (¬CanonicalR M' W) now fully proven. Three sub-cases remain as sorries requiring iteration.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 6 partial: Added key lemma caseB_M_not_reflexive showing M is not reflexive in Case B. Restructured proof to use irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future. One sub-case proven; remaining cases need iteration infrastructure.

sorry_analysis.fully_proven_case: Line 679: Case B1 h_eq branch with ¬CanonicalR M' W
